title: Territory Claim
description: Authoritative state for ONE org-claimed node (room/sector) in a contested or lawless zone. The server owns this; it is the persistent unit of org-vs-org territorial power - passive income, guard NPCs, and the contestable target of the siege state machine (see siege_state.schema.json). Grounds Guide_11 Territory Control (Drops 6A-6C delivered) and is the object Drop 6D's hostile-takeover acts upon. SEPARATE from Director zone influence (faction_zone_state.schema.json).

source.source_policy: Design schema for standalone Godot server. SW_MUSH Guide_11 supplies the influence/claim/guard/resource model as reference; thresholds and economy numbers are starting points, owner-tunable. Clone Wars era.

node_id.description: The claimable node (a room or sector cell). One claim per node. Player-owned housing nodes cannot be claimed.

zone_id.description: Zone the node belongs to. Must be contested or lawless (secured zones cannot be claimed).

claimed_by_char_id.description: Character who placed the claim (rank-gated; default rank 3+).

security_effective.description: Effective security inside this claim FOR OWNING-ORG MEMBERS. Claiming upgrades lawless->contested for members (PvP-consent protection on home turf). Outsiders still see the zone base. A player city further upgrades citizens (contested->secured); see FACTION_TERRITORY_DESIGN.

influence_tier_at_claim.description: Org influence tier in the zone when the claim was made / last evaluated. Drives passive-income yield band.

guard.description: Optional stationed guard NPC. Aggressive combat NPC that attacks hostile intruders. Adds weekly upkeep on top of base maintenance. Faction-flavored stats are pulled from a guard template by org axis; see FACTION_TERRITORY_DESIGN.

maintenance.description: Recurring treasury drain. Claim lapses (auto-unclaim) if the org treasury cannot cover maintenance on the maintenance tick. Numbers are starting points (Guide_11), owner-tunable.

income.description: Passive resource generation on the slow resource tick (daily by default). Yield scales by (security, influence_tier). Lawless yields more than contested - higher risk, higher reward.

siege.description: Live siege reference if this claim is currently under a hostile-takeover contest (Drop 6D). Null when not contested. The full contest record lives in siege_state.schema.json; this is a back-pointer so claim reads cheaply see 'under siege'.

claimed_at_unix.description: Wall-clock epoch seconds the claim was created.

last_presence_unix.description: Last time an owning-org member was present in the zone. Drives influence-decay timer (no presence 48h => influence decays; claims can ultimately lapse).
